name: Stolen Cargo Data
description: Data on stolen cargo, including the type of cargo, its value, and any relevant details about the theft.
label: Stolen Cargo Data
notes: This data can be used to track stolen cargo and identify patterns in thefts, which can help in preventing future incidents.

name: Printer Data
description: Corrupted data of the mecha printer in the pirate base, might contain information about the mechas that were printed or repaired and their specifications.
label: Printer Data
notes: This data can provide insights into the types of mechas being produced or repaired in the pirate base, which can be useful for understanding their capabilities and weaknesses.

name: Corrupted data and photos of a experimental Mecha
description: Corrupted data and photos of an experimental Mecha, might include information about its design, capabilities, and potential weaknesses.
label: Experimental Mecha Data
notes: This data can be valuable for understanding the experimental Mecha's strengths and weaknesses, which can be crucial for planning strategies to counter it.
